raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against Citi XXXXXXXX XXXX regarding a mishandled billing dispute on my credit card account. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I disputed a transaction in the amount of {$82.00} with the merchant XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX posted on XX/XX/year>. This charge relates to a traffic fine that the rental company charged directly to my credit card without consulting me and without it being disclosed in the original rental agreement. 


Initially, I incorrectly categorized the dispute ; however, upon realizing the mistake, I promptly submitted a corrected dispute under the correct reason ( " Billing Dispute '' ). 

Despite my good faith efforts to correct the dispute, Citi XXXX XXXX declined the dispute without recategorizing the charge, violating the Fair Credit Billing Act ( XXXX ). 

Specifically, the bank failed to : Conduct a proper investigation. 

Provide adequate explanation and evidence supporting the denial. 

Correctly honor my right to dispute an inaccurate billing. 

I am requesting that Citi XXXXXXXX XXXX immediately refund the full amount of {$82.00} to my account. 

I expect a prompt resolution to this issue. 
If necessary, I am prepared to pursue further legal remedies, including small claims court and arbitration. 

Attached are supporting documents, including transaction records and my communication history. 

Thank you for your assistance.
